title: Monsoon Palace Resort & Spa
testimonial: What Groove Infra created is more than a space — it's an experience. Our guest ratings are consistently 4.8+ stars, and we've become the most sought-after luxury weekend retreat in Western India.
description: 32-room luxury resort with heritage-inspired interiors blending traditional Maharashtrian architecture with contemporary minimalism. Includes 6,000 sq ft full-service spa, multi-cuisine restaurant, infinity pool lounge, and 8 themed villas with private gardens. Hand-selected materials from artisans across Maharashtra.
